title: daemonsudo gate.yaml — the sudoers file for your agents

defaults.description: Action when no rule matches a tool name. 'approve' is safe-by-default.

timeout.description: How long a pending approval waits before it is denied. Number = seconds, or a string like '30s', '10m', '1h'.

rules.description: Glob on tool name → action. Most-specific glob wins, then file order.

redact.description: Arg paths (globs, e.g. '*.password') whose values are replaced with [redacted] in receipts and approval cards. Full args are only ever stored as a hash.

token_env.description: Name of the environment variable holding the bot token (never the token itself).

allowed_users.description: Telegram user IDs allowed to approve.

host.description: Bind address. Keep it on localhost unless you know what you are doing.
